tagline.en: You climb to make the world feel larger.
tagline.zh: 你攀岩，是为了让世界变得更辽阔。

description.en: New landscapes, unfamiliar rock, and the promise of discovery pull you forward.
description.zh: 新的风景、陌生的岩石和发现的可能，会不断把你向前拉。

longDescription.en: For you, climbing is a passport into places you might never meet otherwise. A memorable day has a strong sense of landscape and leaves you curious about what lies beyond the next ridge. Grades matter, but they rarely lead the decision on their own.
longDescription.zh: 对你来说，攀岩像一本进入陌生地方的护照。难忘的一天必须拥有鲜明的环境感，也会让你继续好奇下一道山脊后面有什么。难度当然重要，但很少会独自决定你的选择。

alt.en: A climber looking across a wide coastal climbing landscape
alt.zh: 攀岩者眺望辽阔海岸攀岩地貌的版画插图

tagline.en: You climb to understand how movement fits together.
tagline.zh: 你攀岩，是为了理解动作如何彼此连接。

description.en: Balance, timing, and elegant solutions matter more than collecting numbers.
description.zh: 平衡、时机和优雅解法，比收集难度数字更吸引你。

longDescription.en: You read a route as a structure of choices. The best climbing gives you something to refine: a quieter foot, a more patient hip, a sequence that suddenly becomes obvious. Progress feels most satisfying when it changes how you move, not only what you send.
longDescription.zh: 你会把路线读成一组彼此关联的选择。最好的攀爬总有值得打磨的细节：更安静的脚步、更耐心的髋部，或突然变得清晰的动作序列。真正让你满足的进步，是改变了你如何移动，而不只是完攀了什么。

alt.en: A climber tracing movement patterns across a geometric rock face
alt.zh: 攀岩者在几何岩面上寻找动作路径的版画插图

tagline.en: You come alive when effort has a clear direction.
tagline.zh: 当投入拥有明确方向时，你最有生命力。

description.en: A demanding line, honest attempts, and measurable progress make climbing meaningful.
description.zh: 高要求路线、诚实尝试和可见进步，让攀岩对你产生意义。

longDescription.en: You enjoy building a relationship with a difficult route. Each attempt is information, each return has purpose, and small improvements are worth celebrating. You are not chasing difficulty for display; you value the focus and self-knowledge a serious project can create.
longDescription.zh: 你喜欢与一条困难路线建立长期关系。每次尝试都是信息，每次回来都有目的，哪怕很小的进步也值得庆祝。你并不是为了展示而追求难度；真正吸引你的是项目带来的专注和自我认识。

alt.en: A focused climber working a steep crack project
alt.zh: 攀岩者专注尝试陡峭裂缝项目的版画插图

tagline.en: You want a climbing day to feel like a journey.
tagline.zh: 你希望一个攀岩日真正像一段旅程。

description.en: Scale, commitment, and the long way in are part of what makes the experience worthwhile.
description.zh: 宏大尺度、投入感和漫长接近，本来就是体验价值的一部分。

longDescription.en: You are drawn to objectives that demand a whole-day mindset. The climbing matters, but so do the approach, changing weather, teamwork, and the feeling of moving through consequential terrain. Preparation gives you freedom to meet uncertainty with calm.
longDescription.zh: 你会被需要整日投入的目标吸引。攀爬本身很重要，但接近、天气变化、团队配合，以及穿越严肃地形的感受同样重要。充分准备会给你自由，让你更从容地面对未知。

alt.en: An alpinist looking toward a remote mountain spire
alt.zh: 高山攀登者望向偏远山峰的版画插图

tagline.en: The people around the route are part of the route.
tagline.zh: 路线周围的人，也是路线体验的一部分。

description.en: Shared energy, encouragement, and the stories between attempts shape your best days.
description.zh: 共享能量、互相鼓励和尝试之间的故事，塑造了你最好的攀岩日。

longDescription.en: Climbing is one of the ways you build belonging. You appreciate destinations where information travels easily, partners are found naturally, and the end of the day has room for conversation. A good send is wonderful; a good day shared well lasts longer.
longDescription.zh: 攀岩是你建立归属感的方式之一。你喜欢信息自然流动、容易找到伙伴、一天结束后仍有交流空间的目的地。完攀当然很棒，但与合适的人共享的一天，会留得更久。

alt.en: Climbers resting together at a warm mountain crag
alt.zh: 攀岩伙伴在温暖山地岩场共同休息的版画插图

tagline.en: You leave room for the day to become what it needs to be.
tagline.zh: 你愿意给一天留出空间，让它自然成为该有的样子。

description.en: Variety, sustainable rhythm, and good judgment matter more than chasing one extreme.
description.zh: 变化、可持续节奏和良好判断，比追逐某个极端更重要。

longDescription.en: You are at your best when a trip offers options. Some days become projects, some become explorations, and some are simply satisfying sessions with good people. You value the freedom to respond to weather, energy, and curiosity without feeling that the plan has failed.
longDescription.zh: 当一趟旅行拥有选择空间时，你最自在。有些日子会变成项目日，有些会变成探索日，还有些只是和伙伴一起完成一次舒服的 session。你珍惜根据天气、体力和好奇心调整计划的自由，而不会因此觉得计划失败了。

alt.en: A climber overlooking several possible paths through a mountain landscape
alt.zh: 攀岩者眺望山地中多种可能路径的版画插图
